campaign.title: Status Update — Your Position
campaign.subject: [First Name] — update on your [Category] position in [Community Name]
campaign.description: Decision point — trial ending, slot status changed, AM recommendation

landing_page.ai_goal: Get the commitment — trial ending, slots filling

slides.title: Status Update
slides.narration: This is a status update. Your situation in your community has changed since we last spoke. Here's where things stand.

slides.title: What Changed

stats.label: slots when I first contacted you

slides.narration: When I first contacted you, your category had this many slots. Today, this many remain. That means this many positions have been filled while you've been deciding. And Founder pricing — the rate locked for three years — has this many days left.

slides.title: Your Trial Results

content.headline: What You've Gotten So Far
points: All of this stops when your trial ends on [date]

slides.narration: During your trial, you've had this many listing views, this many news mentions, and this much total reach. That's real visibility with real local residents. All of it stops on your trial end date unless you activate your membership.

slides.title: Decision Time

content.headline: Activate Your Membership — $300/month
content.am_note: My honest assessment: lock this in. Your category is filling. Once it's full, the next option is Community Sponsor at a higher rate — or the waitlist.

slides.narration: Here's my honest assessment. I think you should lock this in. Your category is filling and I can't guarantee a slot will be available next week. If you're ready, click below. If you want to talk, call me. But I can't hold slots.

slides.title: If Not Now

content.headline: If the Timing Isn't Right
content.body: I respect that. I'll keep your proposal on file. But your slot will open to the next [Category] business in [Community Name]. That's just how it works.

slides.narration: If the timing isn't right, I respect that. I'll keep your proposal on file and let you know if your category fills or pricing changes. But I want you to hear this directly — I can't hold slots. If another business in your category signs up, that's one less position available.
